package.name: amr_controller
package.description: AMR Controller package. - stm32_bridge (C++) : Joystick teleop -> STM32 USB serial; encoder feedback -> /encoder - odometry_publisher (Python): Encoder -> /odom + TF, Ackermann math, auto-detect encoder mode Steering: Ackermann front 2 wheels (mechanically synchronized via servo). Drive : 4WD via 1 motor PG45 + 2 differentials + shaft.
